case_for: Patterson has flashed touchdown-dependent upside in the past (7.8 and 8.2 pt games) so garbage-time or goal-line usage could spike his ceiling if he scores multiple times, though this is a stretch given his current role.
case_against: His recent usage has collapsed to near-nothing (1.4 and 1.0 pts in his last two games, well below the 1.0 pt consensus projection), signaling a clear backup/change-of-pace role with minimal touches and no path to 12 points absent an extremely unlikely multi-touchdown outlier.
